records.question: Which tourist attractions are galleries where you can get there by walking?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN tourist_attraction_features ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = tourist_attraction_features.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_description = 'gallery' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'walk'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions
WHERE Attraction_Type_Code = 'gallery'
  AND How_to_Get_There LIKE '%walk%'

SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN photos ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = photos.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE photos.filename = '762' AND ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_description = 'gallery' AND photos.name = 'game2' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'bus'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id

  AND tourist_attractions.How_to_Get_There LIKE '%bus%'
  AND Photos.Name = 'game2'
  AND Photos.Filename = '762'

  AND Locations.Location_Name = 'Film Festival'
  AND Locations.Address = '770 Edd Lane Apt. 098'
  AND Photos.Name = 'din1'
  AND Photos.Filename = '259'

SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN locations ON tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id
JOIN staff ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = staff.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_description = 'gallery' AND locations.location_name = 'African Adventure' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'bus' AND tourist_attractions.name = 'film festival' AND staff.name = 'Carmella' AND locations.address = '88271 Barrows Union Suite 203'
records.pred_sql:

FROM Tourist_Attractions ta
JOIN Locations l ON ta.Location_ID = l.Location_ID
JOIN Ref_Attraction_Types rat ON ta.Attraction_Type_Code = rat.Attraction_Type_Code
JOIN Staff s ON ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID = s.Tourist_Attraction_ID
WHERE ta.Name = 'film festival'
  AND l.Address = '88271 Barrows Union Suite 203'
  AND l.Location_Name = 'African Adventure'
  AND ta.How_to_Get_There LIKE '%bus%'
  AND s.Name = 'Carmella'
  AND rat.Attraction_Type_Description LIKE '%gallery%'
